title: Assert: iterateAndNext node has no back
body:
Probably very similar to #3324.
Using the latest git master (880a9be3b) on arch linux
```
Verilator 4.221 devel rev v4.220-26-g880a9be3
```

Using the following test code:
```verilog
// Licensed under CC0
module a #(parameter N=5) ();
   generate if(N>1) begin
      a #(.N(N/2)) foo();
      a #(.N(N-N/2)) bar();
   end
   endgenerate
endmodule


module test();
   localparam N=5;
   a #(.N(N)) foo ();
endmodule
```

Verilator crashes:
`verilator -cc --build test.sv --top test  --debug --gdbbt`
```
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtest_025_unknown.tree
- V3Inline.cpp:713:   inlineAll:

Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
AstNode::iterateAndNext (this=0x1, v=...) at ../V3Ast.cpp:810
810	    UASSERT_OBJ(!(nodep && !nodep->m_backp), nodep, "iterateAndNext node has no back");
#0  AstNode::iterateAndNext (this=0x1, v=...) at ../V3Ast.cpp:810
#1  0x0000555555785b61 in AstNode::iterateChildren (this=this@entry=0x5555561e5480, v=...) at ../V3Ast.cpp:784
```
